name: Localtunity
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Localtunity with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Localtunity + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Localtunity with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Localtunity?

Localtunity, a dynamic online community dedicated to fostering local connections and supporting neighborhood businesses, enriches the lives of residents and entrepreneurs alike. Whether you're seeking local events, business opportunities, or ways to engage with your community, Localtunity provides a vibrant platform to connect with your neighbors.

Why Localtunity + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Localtunity, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Localtunity through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Localtunity.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Localtunity, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Localtunity + Synup?

The Localtunity integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Localtunity integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Localtunity logo to manage the Synup + Localtunity integration and associated settings.

seo.title: Localtunity
seo.description: Maximize visibility on Localtunity. Synup integration ensures accurate business data for superior online presence and customer engagement.
